DISCOVERY 612, DEFENDANTS JUAN HUANG AND JUN LIN'S MOTION TO COMPEL ANSWERS TO FORM INTERROGATORIES, SPECIAL INTERROGATORIES, AND DOCUMENT PRODUCTION IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION HAS BEEN FILED AS OF JULY 15, 2010. PLAINTIFF'S FAILURE TO RESPOND IS A MISUSE OF THE DISCOVERY PROCESS. PLAINTIFF IS ORDERED TO PROVIDE FULL, COMPLETE AND ACCURATE RESPONSES TO THE INTERROGATORIES AND TO PRODUCE DOCUMENTS BY AUGUST 13, 2010. DEFENDANT'S MOTION FOR SANCTIONS AND ATTORNEY'S FEES IS GRANTED. DEFENDANT IS AWARDED SANCTIONS AGAINST PLAINTIFF IN THE AMOUNT OF $478, WHICH SHALL BE PAID BY PLAINTIFF TO DEFENDANT BY AUGUST 20, 2010. JUDGE DONALD SULLIVAN. NOT REPORTED.

MINI MINUTES: Appearance for Defendant. Order to Show Cause to Plaintiff's Counsel for failure of Plaintiff's Counsel and Plaintiff to appear at Pre-Arbitration Settlement Conference on 6/1/2010 is heard this day. No appearance by Plaintiff. Plaintiff's counsel is sanctioned $250.00, for failure to appear. The OSC is re-set to 9/16/2010 at 1:30 PM, in Department 212. Proceedings not reported. (212)

Notice And Motion To Compel Answers To Form Interrogatories, Special Interrogatories, And Document Production; Request For Sanctions And Asonable Attorney Fees
Off Calendar Jul-20-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances made by Plantiff / Defendant. Tentative adopted.

DEFENDANTS JUAN HUANG and JUN LIN's Motion to Compel Answers to Form Interrogatories, Special Interrogatories, and Document Production is granted. No opposition has been filed as of July 15, 2010. Plaintiff's failure to respond is a misuse of the discovery process. Plaintiff is ordered to provide full, complete and accurate responses to the Interrogatories and to produce documents by August 13, 2010. Defendant's Motion for Sanctions and Attorney's Fees is granted. Defendant is awarded Sanctions against Plaintiff in the amount of $478, which shall be paid by Plaintiff to Defendant by August 20, 2010. Judge Donald Sullivan. Not Reported.
